author: SantiMod
content:
@here We've released the very first Star Atlas State of the Economy Report! 

This quarterly publication brings you a birds-eye view of economic activity:

 Full Census data
 Labor force & employment
 Contribution to total global crypto adoption

https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-releases-its-inaugural-triple-a-state-of-the-economy-report-b06f3b8d9b4

Direct link to the Star Atlas State of the Economy Report   https://staratlas.com/newsroom/economic-reports
